description: The Islamic Revolutionary Council was a governing body established by [Ruhollah Khomeini](/people/ruhollah-khomeini) in January 1979 to oversee the transition of power during the [Iranian Revolution](/events/iranian-revolution-1979). Its members included [Mehdi Bazargan](/people/mehdi-bazargan), [Yadollah Sahabi](/people/yadollah-sahabi), [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei), [Abolhassan Banisadr](/people/abolhassan-banisadr), and others. It operated in parallel with Bazargan's provisional government and was dissolved in 1980 after the first Majlis was elected.
editorial_notes: Jan 1979 - mid 1980. Established by Khomeini. Dissolved after 1st Majlis elected.
